completion_summary: Bound vNext metrics to exact replayed trajectory bytes, added layered evaluation provenance and adversarial tamper controls, and preserved replay-only v0.2 compatibility
notes: Expanded after full-suite compatibility testing exposed an incomplete-attempt cost edge case in the layered evaluator.
scope: Bind every evaluation and leaderboard metric to exact source trajectory bytes, enforce finite and directional endpoint semantics, include layered evaluation provenance, and fail closed on missing or tampered data
